response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the on-screen lyrics for both 'Pink Rose' and 'Chase! Chase! Chase!'. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON provided English lyrics for 'Pink Rose', so manual transcription of the Japanese vocals (verified by on-screen text) was performed. 'Chase! Chase! Chase!' was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are anchored to vocal bursts. Transitions are instantaneous where phrasing is continuous, and durations are truncated to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: キスするときのわたしの顔
subtitles.english: My face when we kiss

subtitles.original: もっときれいに見せたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to show you a more beautiful me

subtitles.original: 抱きしめて いつでもかわいいフリして
subtitles.english: Hold me tight, always pretending to be cute

subtitles.original: 真っ赤に色づく日を ずっとずっと待ってる
subtitles.english: I've been waiting forever for the day I turn bright red

subtitles.original: 泣かないで 本当の自分を知らずに
subtitles.english: Don't cry without even knowing your true self

subtitles.original: まだ淡い花びらに 夢の重さ抱えたまま
subtitles.english: Still holding the weight of dreams on these pale petals

subtitles.original: 落ちていく時の甘い香り
subtitles.english: The sweet scent as time falls away

subtitles.original: 繰り返すたびにひどくなる
subtitles.english: It gets worse every time it repeats

subtitles.original: 抱きしめて 今だけ好きだってフリして
subtitles.english: Hold me tight, pretend you love me just for now

subtitles.original: ただひとつだけなら 全部全部いらない
subtitles.english: If I can't have that one thing, I don't need anything at all

subtitles.original: Bloomin' like a Rose 本当の孤独を知らない
subtitles.english: Bloomin' like a Rose, you don't know true loneliness

subtitles.original: まだ淡い花びらに 涙の粒抱えたまま
subtitles.english: Still holding droplets of tears on these pale petals

subtitles.original: チェイス！チェイス！チェイス！
subtitles.english: [Title: Chase! Chase! Chase!]

subtitles.original: あとそう3センチ
subtitles.english: Just 3 more centimeters

subtitles.original: キミのくちびるまで
subtitles.english: Until I reach your lips

subtitles.original: 妄想渦巻く イカした夢はなぜか
subtitles.english: For some reason, this cool dream filled with delusions...

subtitles.original: これからってトコで いつも覚める
subtitles.english: ...always ends just when it's getting good

subtitles.original: わずかに10センチ
subtitles.english: Merely 10 centimeters

subtitles.original: 伸ばす腕ムナしく
subtitles.english: My reaching arm is in vain

subtitles.original: 閉まる扉 ホームに独りきり
subtitles.english: The doors close, leaving me alone on the platform

subtitles.original: キミとガラス越しに 目と目が合う
subtitles.english: Our eyes meet with you through the glass

subtitles.original: ああ ここはひとつ笑うしかない
subtitles.english: Ah, all I can do here is laugh

subtitles.original: 白線のうしろ 立ち上がった
subtitles.english: Behind the white line, I stood up

subtitles.original: 不覚にも涙がこぼれても
subtitles.english: Even if tears should accidentally fall

subtitles.original: ここはひとつ笑うしかない
subtitles.english: All I can do here is laugh

subtitles.original: いつかキミまで 追いつくかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'll eventually catch up to you

subtitles.original: 脱いで捨てちゃうほど
subtitles.english: To the point where I'd just throw it away

subtitles.original: かわりはいるよなんて
subtitles.english: Saying there's always a replacement...

subtitles.original: どうなの？おじいちゃんおばあちゃん
subtitles.english: How about it? Grandpa, Grandma

subtitles.original: すぐに投げちゃ いけないんだよね
subtitles.english: You shouldn't just give up right away, right?

subtitles.original: 今も昔も これからずっと
subtitles.english: Now, in the past, and from now on forever

subtitles.original: かわりのボクは どこにもいない
subtitles.english: There's no replacement for me anywhere

subtitles.original: もう ここはひとつ笑うしかない
subtitles.english: Now, all I can do here is laugh

subtitles.original: わかりあえる その日が来るまで
subtitles.english: Until the day we can understand each other
